title: Duronic Digital Kitchen Scale KS5000 Electronic Kitchen Scales with Bowl and Large Display 5kg Capacity Weighing Scales - Ideal Food Measurement, Baking scales, Pet Food, and parcel scales.
features: UNRIVALED BAKING SCALES PRECISION WITH EVERY MEASURE – Elevate your culinary creations with the KS5000 black digital kitchen scales. Boasting high-accuracy sensors, these electronic kitchen scales with bowl guarantee precision down to the gram, ensuring your recipes turn out perfectly every time.

SPACIOUS 3L STAINLESS-STEEL BOWL FOR VERSATILE PREP – The accompanying large stainless-steel measuring bowl, holding up to 3000ml, seamlessly fits onto the digital kitchen scale, doubling as a mixing container for your convenience. Whether measuring, cooking, baking, or mixing, these kitchen weighing scales are your reliable companion.

CRYSTAL-CLEAR READINGS IN ANY LIGHT – Featuring a large backlit LCD screen, the digital kitchen scales offer clear visibility with crystal-clear digits. Whether it's under bright kitchen lights or dim evening settings, reading measurements is effortless, enhancing your cooking experience.

SMART TARE FUNCTION FOR CONTINUOUS MEASURING – Simplify your ingredient preparation with the smart auto-zero tare function. This feature allows the use of various containers without affecting accuracy, making these electronic kitchen scales indispensable for adding ingredients sequentially.

COMPREHENSIVE MEASUREMENT UNITS FOR EVERY RECIPE – With the ability to measure in grams (g), millilitres (ml), pounds and ounces (lb.oz), and fluid ounces (fl.oz), this weight scale is versatile enough to accommodate any recipe's needs, ensuring you're ready for any cooking challenge.

EFFORTLESS MAINTENANCE AND CONVENIENCE – Designed with your convenience in mind, the KS5000 electronic scale comes with a removable bowl that's easy to clean and a compact base that's simple to store, making them a hassle-free addition to your kitchen arsenal, even for measuring pet food or postal services.

READY TO GO WITH INCLUDED BATTERIES – Jump straight into your next cooking adventure without delay. These digital kitchen scales come equipped with 3 AAA batteries, ensuring you're prepared from the moment you unbox the digital kitchen scales with bowl, embodying efficiency and readiness.
description: Product Description Duronic Digital Kitchen Scales with Bowl KS5000 Follow your favourite recipes with the help of a set of KS5000/SR silver digital kitchen scales. The KS5000 kitchen weighing scales will look the part in any kitchen, and because they have a very slim profile (only 1.6cm!) they can be stored away easily too. The removable 3-litre stainless-steel mixing bowl can be used to weigh all the ingredients you need in one go, so there's less mess and less washing up to do! As well as weighing dry ingredients, these scales can also measure wet ingredients/fluids too. Simply select the correct unit according to what you wish to start measuring. I mperial or Metric? We're all used to measuring one way or the other, and with the ability to change the unit means these kitchen scales can suit whoever is using them at the time. Switching between different units of measurement couldn't be easier, simply touch the unit button to choose between grams (g), millilitres (ml), fluid ounces (fl.oz) or pounds and ounces (lb.oz). Dimensions The black and silver platform is 22x11cm/8.7x4.3in in size meaning that it can hold a variety of types of bowls or containers. The blue backlit LCD screen is positioned forward from the platform so that no matter what bowl you place on top, you will still be able to see the readings clearly. Choose Between Metric and Imperial It's simple to change between units, simply press the unit button to switch between grams or pounds and ounces. The LED display with large black digits clearly shows the clock and the measurements taken when the scale is being used. Maximum Capacity The KS5000 weighing platform can weigh up to a maximum of 5kg/11lb. The precision sensors inside the scale ensure that every measurement is accurately measured up 1g. The large stainless-steel mixing bowl can hold up to 3 litres. Other Features Powered by 3x AAA batteries, the KS5000 kitchen scales retain power for longer thanks to it's auto-off feature. If left untouched it will automatically switch itself off after 60 seconds. It also features a low battery indicator and an overweight indicator to let you know when something isn't right. It's ideal for making sweet delicious treats perfectly every time. Or for calculating your calories and macros if you're following a special diet. It's highly versatile; you could even use the scales to weigh small packages and letters! Or measure out the right amount of your pet's food and treats.
